subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast witnessed the mighty signs of thy Lord! It behooveth thee to raise up the hands of thanksgiving unto the Almighty, the All-Forgiving, for the veil hath been rent asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من رای ایات ربه الکبری علیک ان تبسط اکف الشکر الی العزیز الغفار بما هتک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
